testcase.name: test_backup_manager_save_backup_index
testcase.failure: tests\unit\data\sync\test_backup_recovery_unit.py:156: in test_backup_manager_save_backup_index backup_id = backup_manager.create_backup(data_sources) src\data\sync\backup_recovery.py:156: in create_backup backup_id = f"backup_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y % m % d_ % H % M % S')}_{int(time.time() * 1000) % 1000}" E ValueError: Invalid format string
